entries.details: Integrated Verification pass for AC-058 (regression vs AC-001..AC-050 on open-source layout). All core checks pass: npm install && npm run build -> dist/index.js; npx tsc --noEmit -> clean; docker build --platform linux/amd64 -> image runs as UID 10001; relay-config.docker.yaml parses via loadConfig() without code changes; no vendor SDKs in package.json or source tree; .env.example has zero vendor env vars.

Integrated Verification pass for AC-019 (health_check). Tested at real WebSocket boundary via running docker-compose stack (relay + control-plane-stub + postgres + mongo). Sent JSON-RPC 2.0 health_check request through stub to relay. Response: [{resourceId:'order-pg', type:'postgres', healthy:true, latencyMs:6}, {resourceId:'order-mongo', type:'mongodb', healthy:true, latencyMs:0}]. All 5 test groups passed: correct JSON-RPC 2.0 response shape, both drivers present, all latencyMs >=0, error-handling path verified (try/catch in HealthReporter.checkAll() catches throws, logs warn with {err,resourceId}, returns healthy:false+latencyMs, other drivers unaffected), dispatch routes health_check to healthReporter.checkAll(). No defects.

Integrated Verification pass for AC-017 (list_resources). Tested at real WebSocket boundary via running docker-compose stack (relay + control-plane-stub + postgres + mongo). Sent JSON-RPC 2.0 list_resources request (no params) to relay through the stub. Response: { jsonrpc:'2.0', id, result: [{ resourceId:'order-pg', type:'postgres', name:'Order Service PostgreSQL', database:'relay', readOnly:true }, { resourceId:'order-mongo', type:'mongodb', name:'Order Service MongoDB', database:'relay', readOnly:true }] }. All 17 shape/contract checks passed: jsonrpc=2.0, id echoed, no error key, result is array of 2, every entry has exactly {resourceId,type,name,database,readOnly:true}, readOnly===true for all, types postgres|mongodb, both expected resources present, response shape matches createResponse(id,result). No defects.

Integrated Verification pass for AC-018 (describe_resource). Tested at real WebSocket boundary via running docker-compose stack (relay + control-plane-stub + postgres + mongo). All 3 test cases pass: (1) unknown resourceId 'nonexistent' returns error code -32602 with message 'Unknown resource: nonexistent', (2) valid order-pg returns {tables:[{table_name,table_type}], type:'postgres', database:'relay'}, (3) valid order-mongo returns {tables:[], type:'mongodb', database:'relay'}. No defects.

Independent QA verification pass for AC-020 (protocol: unknown method + handler error). Tested at real WebSocket boundary via running docker-compose stack (relay + control-plane-stub + postgres + mongo). Probe script scripts/probe-ac020.mjs sent 4 test cases: (1) unknown method 'bogus_method' returns error code -32601 with message 'Unknown method: bogus_method'; (2) execute SELECT * FROM nonexistent_table on order-pg causes driver throw, catch block logs error-level with {err, requestId} and returns -32603 with relation does not exist message; (3) known method list_resources still works after error tests; (4) second unknown method 'unknown_method_xyz' confirms dynamic method name insertion. All 9 checks passed. Relay logs confirm 'Request handler error' at level 50 with {err, requestId} and audit entry with result:'error' and errorMessage set.
